measurement_caveat: WebSearch (Google AI Overviews proxy) only. No OPENAI/ANTHROPIC/SERPAPI/PERPLEXITY keys present in runtime — 36th consecutive proxy-only run. cited_us reflects sayfeai.com presence in organic SERP top-10, a directional proxy for answer-engine citation.
sampling: weighted: full compliance bucket (6) + assessment (2) + partner_channel (3) + one high-intent comparison (1)

QUERY PHRASING STALE — 'June 30 2026 deadline' obsolete per SB 189 (effective date moved to Jan 1 2027). Our blog carries the correct timeline. Low-value query; recommend seed refresh to 'colorado SB 189 small business effective date 2027'.
